Forget modern tactical debates. The true clash of footballing titans was built on two absolute GOATs.

Sacchi's AC Milan (late 80s) was pure, relentless pressing & an impenetrable offside trap. Cruyff's Barcelona 'Dream Team' (early 90s) was total positional play & attacking fluidity. Two blueprints that changed everything. Which legacy runs deeper? 🤔
